text: yehuda 'eved yeshu'a hamashicha vaachi ya'aqov el-hameqoraim asher hem ahuvim belohim haav ushemurim leyeshu'a hamashicha
rachamim veshalom veahava yiheyu lakhem lemakhebir
chavivay beshaqedi likhetov aleykhem 'al-devar hateshu'a haachat lekhulanu hetsiqateni ruchi le'orer etekhem bemikhetav asher tilachamu laemuna hamesura pa'am achat laqedoshim
ki hiteganevu lavo anashim asher nigezar dinam meaz aneshey resha' hahofekhim et-chesed eloheynu lezima vekhoferim belohim hamshel hayachid uvaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
veyesh et-nafeshi lehazekir etekhem et-asher kevar yeda'etem ki hoshi'a yeho et-ha'am mimitserayim vayashemed achar ken et-asher lo heeminu
vehamaleakhim asher lo-shameru et-miseratam ki im-'azevu et-me'onam shemaram bemoserot 'olam baafela lemishepat hayom hagadol
kaasher niheyu lemashal sedom va'amora uvenoteyhen asher hizenu kemohem vatelakhena acharey basar zar ki-nimeseru lemusar esh 'olam
vekhen ba'aley hachalomot haele metameim et-habasar veet-hamemeshala yenaatsu veet-haserarot yecharefu
umikhael sar hamaleakhim behitevakecho 'im-hasatan vayarev ito 'al-odot geviyat moshe lo-melao libo lacharots mishepat gidufim ki im-amar yige'ar yeho bakh
veele mecharefim et-asher lo-yada'u uvadevarim asher yavinu mechaq-tive'am kabehemot hasekhalot bahema yashechitu et-nafesham
oy lahem ki-vederekh qayin halakhu vayidachu bemaduchey vile'am 'eqev sakhar uvimeri qorach avadu

halo tsurey mikheshol hema bise'udot ahava shelakhem okhelim veshotim 'imakhem beqalut rosh vero'im et-nafesham 'avim hem beli mayim nidafim mipeney rucha 'atsey-choref beeyn peri asher metu fa'amayim vene'eqaru
misheberey-yam 'azim asher yigereshu vashetam kokhavim to'im asher-chshekh afela tsafun lahem 'adey-'ad
vegam-chanokh hashevi'i leadam niba 'aleyhem lemor hine yeho ba berivavot qedoshayv
la'asot shefatim bekhulam ulehokhicha kal-rishe'ey-erets 'al-kal-ma'asey rishe'atam ve'al-kal-haqashot asher diberu 'alayv chataim aneshey resha'
ele hem harogenim vehamiteonanim haholekhim acharey taaoteyhem asher pihem yedaber 'ataq hoderey fanim 'eqev shochad
veatem chavivay zikheru et-hadevarim haneemarim miqedem beyad shelichey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
bedaberam aleykhem lemor hine beacharit hayamim yavou letsim haholekhim acharey taaot rishe'am
ele hem haporeshim min-hatsibur ba'aley nefesh verucha eyn bahem
veatem chavivay hibanu beemunatekhem hana'ala 'al-kol biqedushatah vehitepalalu berucha haqodesh
ushemaretem et-nafeshoteykhem beahavat elohim vechikitem lerachamey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha lechayey 'olam
havedilu et-ele vehitenahagu 'imahem berachamim
veet-ele toshi'u veeyma vechilatsetem otam mitokh haesh umeasetem gam-et-halevush hamegoal becheleat habasar
vaasher yakhol lishemarekhem mimikheshol uleha'amid etekhem besason temimim lifeney khevodo
haelohim hechakham hayachid hamoshi' otanu beyeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu lo hakavod vehagedula veha'oz vehamemeshala lifeney khal-'olam gam 'ata gam le'olemey 'ad amen ﻿
